t_ch: 无法…打破……
t_en: Can't... be broken...

t_ch: …什么轮回、宿命，别逗我了！哪个人的路不是靠自己走出来的？天天指望着神明和预言保佑的家伙，才会活成这幅人不人鬼不鬼的模样吧？
t_en: ...Cycles, fate? Give me a break! Everyone has to walk their path! Those who cling to gods and prophecies end up as hollow shells of themselves.

t_ch: 当年的我可要更加不堪哪…坑蒙拐骗、胡作非为，就为了在这狗屁世道上活下来！要是我早早就认了命……
t_en: Back then, I was nothing but a scoundrel, a cheat, clawing and scrambling just to survive in this messed-up world. If I'd given up and played along...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那这个可悲的世界，怕不是早就变成一片黑黢黢的废料场了吧！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This place would've been nothing more than a lifeless wasteland by now.</color>

t_ch: 火种……
t_en: Coreflame...

t_ch: 必须由我……
t_en: It has to be me...

t_ch: 唉…怪我怪我，怎能指望一个彻头彻尾的疯子听进去苦口良言？
t_en: Ugh, my bad. Why bother offering wisdom to a mad dog who wouldn't understand it anyway?

t_ch: 知道为什么要带你来这儿吗，疯狗——我听说，你之前跟那个金毛小狮子大战过一场啊？
t_en: Do you know why I dragged you here, mutt? Word is, you've tangled with that golden-haired lion before.

t_ch: 估计逃也逃不出你的掌心，今天的有氧热身也算做足了。接下来……
t_en: Looks like there's no getting away from you, and hey, that was a pretty good warm-up. Now...

t_ch: 来点对抗运动，如何？
t_en: How about we spice things up with a bit of competition?

t_ch: 同为{RUBY_B#死亡，纷争，诡计}「灾厄」{RUBY_E#}神权的继承者，我当半神的经验——可比那小狮子多出整整一千年哪。
t_en: As a fellow heir to the divine authority of {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, Trickery}Calamity{RUBY_E#}, I've been a demigod for a thousand years longer than the little lion.

t_ch: 现在——由我来验验你这盗火者的成色吧！
t_en: Now, let me see if you're worth your title, Flame Reaver!

t_ch: 一千余年前，黎明云崖……
t_en: A thousand years ago, at Dawncloud...

t_ch: *奥赫玛的全体公民哪——今天，我要给你们带来两个消息：一则悲报，一则佳音。*
t_en: To all citizens of Okhema — today, I bring you two pieces of news: one sorrowful, one joyous.

t_ch: *我首倡，由在座的诸位为逝者送上祝福：我们敬爱的大司铎福罗斯，于早些时候魂归了天父刻法勒的怀抱。愿他安息……*
t_en: First, let us offer our blessings to the departed. Our beloved Chaplain Phoros has returned to the embrace of Sky Father Kephale. May he rest in peace...

t_ch: *但是，各位公民哪，请不必为他的离去哀叹！因为大司铎人生最后的时刻是幸福的，因为他在耳目明晰时听见了天父最后的嘱托……*
t_en: But citizens, do not grieve his passing! In his final moments, Chaplain Phoros found peace. While he still had his wits, he heard the final words of the sky father...

t_ch: *那就是我要为诸位带来的喜报！伟大的负世泰坦陷入缄默以前，它在我的恩师耳边留下的话语…现在，我要将它传予翁法罗斯的全部世人！*
t_en: And that brings me to the joyous news I share with you today! Before the great Worldbearing Titan fell silent, they spoke one final message to my revered mentor. And now, I shall share those words with every soul in Amphoreus!

t_ch: *它说：「神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——」*
t_en: They said: "The prophecy has arrived. My mission is complete, and now I shall fall into eternal silence..."

t_ch: *「永夜将至…但黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹…<color=#dbc291ff>『直到永远』！</color>」*
t_en: "The eternal night is looming, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity to create miracles... forever!"

t_ch: 直到…永远？
t_en: Until... forever?

t_ch: 天父的博爱，已经超越了时间…延续亿万斯年！
t_en: Sky father's love transcends time itself, stretching across endless eons!

t_ch: *公民们，朋友们！作为新任司铎，我在此提议…要在黎明云崖举办为期百日的宴会，以此感恩天父的馈赠！*
t_en: Citizens, friends! As the newly appointed Chaplain, I propose we host a grand hundred-day celebration at Dawncloud, a feast in gratitude for the sky father's gift!

t_ch: *我们的使命，就是把天父的话语转变成坚定的信念哪！这连续百个黎明的载歌载舞，将让翁法罗斯的每位人子相信——*
t_en: Our mission is to transform the sky father's words into unshakable faith. For a hundred dawns, through song and dance, every child of humanity within Amphoreus will come to believe —

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>— The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change..."</color>

t_ch: 哈…那预言里的「分文」……
t_en: Ha, the prophecy's "petty change"...

t_ch: 原来就是字面意思啊……
t_en: Was quite literal, after all...

t_ch: 阿提卡斯…咳…是个好孩子……
t_en: Atticus... He's a good kid...

t_ch: 偷走了你的身份…我…想对你说声抱歉呢……
t_en: I stole your identity... I... owe you an apology...

t_ch: 可我欠了不止一句道歉的…还有你啊，阿雅……
t_en: But I owe more than just an apology... There's also you, Agy...

t_ch: 那时，我…咳、咳咳…我必须离开奥赫玛……
t_en: Back then, I... I had to leave Okhema...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>因为，你是那么地懂得洞察人心…要是留在你的身边……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You see, you were so good at reading hearts... if I had stayed by your side...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我脆弱不堪的谎言…迟早会被揭穿哪。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>My fragile lies... would have been exposed sooner or later.</color>

t_ch: 你的织坊…我多想…再偶然路过一次……
t_en: Your weave shop... I wish... I could chance upon it again, just once...

t_ch: 被你和缇宝阿姐…呵斥一番……
t_en: To be scolded by you and Tribbie...

t_ch: 啊…对不起……
t_en: Ah... I'm sorry...

t_ch: 结果到最后…我…还是……
t_en: In the end... I...

t_ch: 高估了自己啊……
t_en: I overestimated myself...

t_ch: 「但是…至少有一件事…我做到了……」
t_en: "But... at least there's one thing... I did accomplish..."

t_ch: 「刻法勒的火种不在这里…它现在…很安全啊。」
t_en: "Kephale's Coreflame is not here... It's safe... It's safe now..."

t_ch: 「哪怕到头来也只是个小偷…我……」
t_en: "Even if I'm nothing more than a thief... I..."

t_ch: 「…还算为逐火…做了点贡献吧？」
t_en: "...At least I did something for the Flame Chase..."

t_ch: 「阿雅…你能听到吗？」
t_en: "Agy... can you hear me?"

t_ch: 「再和我…说句话吧……」
t_en: "Say something... anything..."

t_ch: 「求你了……」
t_en: "Please..."

t_ch: 你是翁法罗斯湮没无闻的英雄，赛法利娅。你拯救了我们所有人。
t_en: You are the unsung hero of Amphoreus, Cifera. You saved us all.

t_ch: 你出卖了世界……
t_en: You betrayed the world...

t_ch: …用它换来了凡人千年的余生。
t_en: ...and in exchange, you earned humanity a thousand more years of life.

t_ch: 冷知识！多洛斯的猫儿，不仅跑得很快……
t_en: Fun fact! Dolos cats aren't just quick on their feet...

t_ch: 耐力也是一绝！
t_en: They've got the stamina to match!

t_ch: 创…世……
t_en: Cre... ation...

t_ch: 必…须……
t_en: Must...

t_ch: 说话吞吞吐吐的，跑得倒是挺快嘛？
t_en: You sure stumble over your words, but you've got some speed on you!

t_ch: 我要加速了，可别跟丢咯！
t_en: I'm going to speed up. Don't get left behind!

t_ch: 哈…正好停下歇歇脚。
t_en: Ha, just in time to take a break.

t_ch: 那家伙，该不会已经在楼上等我了吧？
t_en: Don't tell me that they might already be waiting for me upstairs...

t_ch: …这次怎么耍他呢？容我构思一波。
t_en: ...How should I mess with them this time? Let me come up with a plan.

t_ch: 救世小子！你可得好好感谢我哪——
t_en: Deliverer! You'd better thank me —

t_ch: 你们优哉游哉的每一秒…可都是本姑娘争取来的！
t_en: Every leisurely second you enjoy... was fought for by yours truly!

t_ch: 本姑娘活了一千多年，还从来没见过能跟上我速度的对手…你算头一个！
t_en: I've been around for over a thousand years, and I've never met anyone who could match my speed... until now!

t_ch: 但我的本事可不止「跑得快」这一项——今天，就让你开开眼！
t_en: But speed isn't my only trick. Today, you're getting the full performance!

t_ch: 打错人了——看来你眼神不太好啊？
t_en: Wrong target — looks like you need to work on your aim.

t_ch: 分身这玩意…要多少就有多少！
t_en: I can summon as many clones as I need!

t_ch: 哈哈哈！乖狗狗，你就这点本事？
t_en: Hahaha! Good dog, is that all you've got?

t_ch: 看来是我高估了你的剑术哪！
t_en: I guess your sword skills aren't as impressive as I thought!

t_ch: …哎唷喂，好险没砍了我的尾巴！
t_en: ...Whoo, close one, almost lost my tail!

t_ch: 速度又快，力气还大…你这家伙，强度有点超模了吧？
t_en: You've got speed and strength... You're a little too perfect, aren't you?

t_ch: 喂喂？别走神呀，流浪狗！
t_en: Hey hey? Don't lose focus, stray dog!

t_ch: 再陪我多玩一会儿呗！反正你也没别的事干，对吧？
t_en: Stick around and play with me a bit longer! It's not like you've got anything better to do, is it?

t_ch: 阻挠…终是徒劳……
t_en: Resisting... is futile...

t_ch: 跟你玩得也够久了……
t_en: I've played with you long enough...

t_ch: 该走为上计了！
t_en: Time to retreat!

t_ch: 于此同时，晨昏之眼内……
t_en: Meanwhile, in the Eye of Twilight...

t_ch: 风堇…？发生什么了？
t_en: Hyacine...? What happened?

t_ch: 掌心里的火种…在颤动。它在向我发出警告……
t_en: The Coreflame in my hand... it's trembling. It's sending me a warning...

t_ch: 白厄阁下，在翁法罗斯的神话中——<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器是艾格勒赠予刻法勒的礼物</color>，对么？
t_en: Lord Phainon, in Amphoreus's mythology, <color=#dbc291ff>isn't the Dawn Device said to be a gift from Aquila to Kephale?</color>

t_ch: 怎么突然问起这个？还是先回到地上……
t_en: Why bring this up now? Let's focus on getting back down there...

t_ch: …白厄阁下！
t_en: ...Lord Phainon!

t_ch: 对。「艾格勒将黎明机器赠予了刻法勒」，是几乎所有神话作者都能达成的共识。
t_en: Yes. Nearly every mythologist agrees "Aquila gifted the Dawn Device to Kephale."

t_ch: 各位，请冷静下来…听我说。
t_en: Everyone, calm down... listen to me.

t_ch: 刚刚，天空的火种在我掌心剧烈地颤动。然后…它的一部分热量从我手中流失了。
t_en: The Coreflame in my hand trembles violently, its warmth slipping away like sand through my fingers.

t_ch: 它消耗了巨大的能量，只为给我留下一道箴言：<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器…熄灭了。</color>
t_en: It burns through immense energy just to leave me with one message: <color=#dbc291ff>The Dawn Device... is extinguished.</color>

t_ch: 这是什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean by that?

t_ch: 这并不好笑…
t_en: This isn't something to joke about...

t_ch: 这不是玩笑，灰宝……
t_en: It's not a joke, Grayie...

t_ch: 是谁干的？
t_en: Who's responsible for this?

t_ch: 我…不知道。
t_en: I... don't know.

t_ch: 如果火种给你留下的消息属实，奥赫玛失去了黎明机器的加护……
t_en: If the Coreflame's message is true, Okhema has lost the Dawn Device's protection...

t_ch: 来自四面八方的黑暗恐怕会瞬间吞噬圣城…那场面注定会很凄惨。
t_en: Darkness will consume the holy city in an instant... and the aftermath will be devastating.

t_ch: 白厄…人家，好像也感觉到了什么……
t_en: Phainon... I feel something too...

t_ch: 你也…感觉到了？
t_en: You sense it as well?

t_ch: 就在刚才，风堇说话的时候…有成百上千股的忆流从我们脚下散逸了出来，升上了天空……
t_en: While Hyacine was speaking... countless streams of memories rose beneath our feet, spiraling into the sky...

t_ch: 记忆的数量太多、份量太大，哪怕隔着堡垒厚厚的墙壁…人家还是能听得一清二楚……
t_en: There are so many, so heavy... Even through the fortress walls, I can still hear them clearly...

t_ch: 飞鸟、若虫、人们…他们的记忆全都混杂在了一起，全都在…哭嚎。
t_en: Birds, nymphs, people... their memories tangled together, their cries echoing as one.

t_ch: 难道是泰坦的殒落导致的？但这根本不合逻辑……
t_en: Could this be because of the Titan's fall? But that doesn't make any sense...

t_ch: 没时间追究原因了！失去了黎明机器的光芒，圣城很快会被黑暗压倒，人们会流离失所……
t_en: There's no time to dwell on the cause! Without the light of the Dawn Device, the holy city will be consumed by darkness, and countless lives will be cast adrift...

t_ch: 大家，你们一定要顺利回到地上，完成黄金裔的使命。而我……
t_en: Everyone, you must return and fulfill the mission of Chrysos Heirs. As for me...

t_ch: 丹宝，你身上还带着法吉娜的灵水，对吧？
t_en: Dannie, you're still carrying Phagousa's spirit water, aren't you?

t_ch: 什么…？
t_en: What...?

t_ch: 那只是为了以防万一，现在还没到……
t_en: That was just a precaution... It's not the time...

t_ch: 不，是时候了。请为我开启通向涡心的道路吧，我还能为地上的人们做最后一件事……
t_en: No, the time has come. Open the path to the Vortex for me. There's still one last thing I can do for the people down there...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>归还艾格勒的火种，接过它的神权……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Return the Coreflame of Aquila and inherit their divine authority...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，我会留在天空，为人们降下庇护。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I'll remain in the sky and cast my protection over the people.</color>

t_ch: 你…要留在这里？
t_en: You're... staying?

t_ch: 嗯。恐怕我们得先说声再见啦，灰宝……
t_en: Yes. I'm afraid this is a goodbye, Grayie...

t_ch: 应该还有别的办法？
t_en: There must be another way!

t_ch: 不用思考其他办法啦，这样…已经能解决问题了。
t_en: Don't waste time thinking about alternatives. This... this will resolve everything.

t_ch: 我们和你一起去，正好走近路。
t_en: We'll go with you. It's the fastest way.

t_ch: 恐怕不行呢。「入口亦为出口」…这是一道单向门。你们还要返回圣城，归还刻法勒的火种。
t_en: That might not be possible. "The entrance serves as the exit"... It's a one-way passage. You need to return to the holy city and deliver Kephale's Coreflame.

t_ch: 而且，以这种方式创造的入口…只能容下一人通过，对吧？
t_en: And an entrance created this way... only has space for one person, doesn't it?
...Yeah.

t_ch: 丹宝，拜托了。
t_en: Dannie, I'm counting on you.

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
t_en: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

t_ch: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧。」
t_en: "Spirit water, reveal the way."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝女士的预言…果真不会落空啊。
t_en: Lady Tribios's prophecy... It seems it didn't fail after all.

t_ch: 哪怕是第二次看，依旧让人觉得不可思议……
t_en: It still feels unreal, even after seeing it a second time...

t_ch: 你和这世上的河流、海洋，一定能形成很棒的默契呀。
t_en: You'd move in perfect harmony with the rivers and seas of this world.

t_ch: 可惜。我和{NICKNAME}不能久留…我们还有挂念的同伴和归宿。
t_en: But we can't stay. {NICKNAME} and I... we have people waiting for us, a home calling us back.

t_ch: 星穹列车，对吧？
t_en: The Astral Express, isn't it?

t_ch: 你们常提起的那位三月七小姐，七宝…我真的很想和她见上一面呢。
t_en: March 7th, the one you always mention... I'd like to meet her someday.

t_ch: 你们应该会很合得来。
t_en: I'm sure the two of you would get along wonderfully.

t_ch: 我能想象你们三人结伴旅行的快活模样。
t_en: I can almost see the three of you traveling together, laughing and sharing moments.

t_ch: 那你呢，风堇。你不会感到悲伤吗？
t_en: And you, Hyacine? Do you not feel sadness?

t_ch: 当然会哦。钻心般的悲伤与不舍…我能原原本本地感受到它们带来的痛楚。
t_en: Of course, I do. A sharp, aching sadness... I feel every bit of it.

t_ch: 何必勉强自己？这里没人会嘲弄真实的脆弱。
t_en: Why hide it? No one here would mock you for showing true vulnerability.

t_ch: 但我是昏光庭院的医者呀，丹恒。面对被病痛侵扰的患者，不露出让人压抑的悲伤表情可是最基本的素养哦。
t_en: As a healer from the Twilight Courtyard, Dan Heng, it's my duty to stay composed in front of those suffering from illness. A sorrowful expression would only add to their burden.

t_ch: 恰好，现在生病的是我深爱的这个世界，那我又怎能在它面前露出愁容呢？
t_en: The world I love is the one suffering now. How could I face it with a frown?

t_ch: 再见，雅辛忒丝。
t_en: Farewell, Hyacinthia.

t_ch: 再见，大家……
t_en: Goodbye, everyone...

t_ch: 请你们…一定要成为救世的英雄呀。至于史诗最后的「空白页」，那些平凡人的生命和故事……
t_en: Please, become the heroes this world needs. And as for the final "blank page" of this epic, the lives and stories of ordinary mortals...

t_ch: 我会将其呵护，直到最后一刻。
t_en: I'll guard them, until the very end.

t_ch: 数日之前，奥赫玛的「昏光庭院」……
t_en: A few days ago, in Okhema's "Twilight Courtyard"...

t_ch: 风堇小姐…你真的要离开了吗？
t_en: Miss Hyacine... are you really leaving?

t_ch: 嗯！白厄阁下已经定好了出征的日子。身为天空英雄的后裔，我必须要做好准备，担起责任。
t_en: Yes! Lord Phainon has already set the date for our departure. As a descendant of the Sky hero, I must prepare myself and carry this responsibility.

t_ch: 可是，这座新开张的「昏光庭院」……
t_en: What about this new Twilight Courtyard?

t_ch: 要相信自己，克莱门汀！你是位优秀的医者，已经可以独当一面了。
t_en: Believe in yourself, Clementine! You're an exceptional healer, more than capable of handling things on your own.

t_ch: 患者们都很信任你，你也配得上他们的信任…这样就足够了，对吧？
t_en: The patients trust you, and you've earned that trust... That's what matters, isn't it?

t_ch: 克莱门汀小姐的医术，很厉害哦——*我们*也觉得，你一定能担得起昏光庭院的牌面！
t_en: Miss Clementine's medical skills are amazing! We believe you'll make the Twilight Courtyard proud!

t_ch: 谢谢您，缇宝大人！我…一定会努力做到的。
t_en: Thank you, Lady Tribbie! I... I'll do my best.

t_ch: 我只是…还缺少风堇小姐的那份自信跟笃定。无论面对多么严重的病患或伤痛，她总是能以微笑面对……
t_en: I just... don't have the same confidence and certainty as Miss Hyacine. No matter how severe the illness or injury, she always faces it with a smile...

t_ch: 其实…我并不是对事事都有自信哦，克莱门汀。
t_en: Honestly... I'm not confident about everything, Clementine.

t_ch: 我只是比较擅长掩饰自己的不安而已——因为在我眼里，那是很重要的素养。
t_en: I've just learned how to hide my unease well — it's a skill I consider essential.

t_ch: 会让风堇小姐感到不自信的事…还真难想象啊。
t_en: It's hard to imagine anything making Miss Hyacine feel uncertain.

t_ch: 那就…举个例子吧？正好，缇宝老师也在……
t_en: Well... shall I give you an example? Since Lady Tribbie happens to be here too...

t_ch: …咦？居然和*我们*也有关嘛？
t_en: ...Wait, we're part of this?

t_ch: 就以逐火之旅为例吧？自从阿格莱雅大人开始领导奥赫玛，每一位承担火种的黄金裔——啊，除了那刻夏老师——都是由她亲自选定的。
t_en: Look at the Flame-Chase Journey. Since Lady Aglaea took over the leadership of Okhema, every Chrysos Heir entrusted with a Coreflame — aside from Professor Anaxa — was personally chosen by her.

t_ch: 唯有我是例外…因为英雄塞涅俄丝指定了自己的血脉作为「天空」的继任者。阿格莱雅大人是否认可我的潜质…直到她离去的那天，我都不得而知。
t_en: I was the outlier... The hero Seliose entrusted her bloodline with the legacy of the "Sky." Lady Aglaea's thoughts on my potential remained a mystery, even up till the day she left.

t_ch: 所以，对于自己能否胜任这项使命…我的内心一直很忐忑呀。
t_en: So I've always carried a lingering doubt about my ability to fulfill this role.

t_ch: 嘿嘿……
t_en: Heh...

t_ch: 缇宝大人…为何笑了？
t_en: Lady Tribbie... Why are you laughing?

t_ch: 因为小风堇想要的答案，其实很简单哦！只要稍微换位思考一下就能明白啦——
t_en: The answer Cinny wants is simple! Just try looking at it from another perspective.

t_ch: 想想看吧！以阿雅的性格，假如她认定你没有那份资质……
t_en: Imagine this: Knowing Agy's personality, if she believed you weren't worthy...

t_ch: 你觉得，她会完全不考虑做另外的打算嘛？
t_en: Don't you think she would have considered other plans?

t_ch: 嘿…这么一想，心情还真是舒畅多了呀。
t_en: Heh... now that I think about it, I feel much better.

t_ch: 我没有阿格莱雅大人那样的慧眼，但…我也绝对不会质疑你的信念，风堇小姐。
t_en: I may not have Lady Aglaea's keen judgment, but I would never question your resolve, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 谢谢你，克莱门汀！
t_en: Thank you, Clementine!

t_ch: 突发奇想——在我出发之前，缇宝大人——你能手把手教我归还火种时的念词吗？
t_en: I had a sudden thought, Lady Tribbie. Before I depart, can you teach me the words for returning the Coreflame?

t_ch: 我之前一直留在树庭助讲，没什么机会来奥赫玛…大家都已熟记于心的语句，对我来说还十分陌生。
t_en: I've always been at the Grove helping with lectures and never had the chance to come to Okhema... The phrases everyone has memorized still feel unfamiliar to me.

t_ch: 等轮到我归还火种的时候…我可不想在大家面前出丑呀。
t_en: I don't want to embarrass myself in front of everyone when it's my turn to return the Coreflame.

t_ch: 这有什么难的？*我们*现在就可以教你！来吧，*我们*念一句，你跟着念一句——
t_en: It's easy! We can teach you right now. Let's go — we will say a line, and you repeat after us.

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦。」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans."

t_ch: 「庄严的十二泰坦……」
t_en: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans..."

t_ch: 「支撑世界的支柱。」
t_en: "Pillars of the world."

t_ch: 「支撑世界的支柱……」
t_en: "Pillars of the world..."

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性。」
t_en: "We seek your divinity."

t_ch: 「我们于此索求神性……」
t_en: "We seek your divinity..."

t_ch: 「…以填补世界的裂缝——」
t_en: "...To mend the rifts of the world—"

t_ch: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血……」
t_en: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold..."

t_ch: 「为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸。」
t_en: "Till we wither in willing service to the prophecy."

t_ch: 献上「火种」吧，黄金裔。
t_en: Surrender the Coreflame, Chrysos Heir.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟，嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot... doot, doot-doot!

t_ch: 小风堇，他们是……
t_en: Cinny, are they...

t_ch: 索拉比斯阁下，露奈比斯阁下……
t_en: Lord Solabis, Lady Lunabis...

t_ch: 天空后裔的使命已经完成…你们的守望终于可以告一段落了。
t_en: The mission of the Skyfolk has been completed... Your watch can finally come to an end.

t_ch: 我们感谢你，风堇姑娘……
t_en: We thank you, Miss Hyacine...

t_ch: 即便我们是那虚假传说的源头，你还是给我们带来了解脱。
t_en: Even though we were the source of that false legend, you still brought us freedom.

t_ch: 请别这么说。没有两位的羽翼，我们在晨昏之眼恐怕会举步维艰。
t_en: Please don't say that. Without your wings, we would have struggled to progress in the Eye of Twilight.

t_ch: 奥赫玛危在旦夕，我必须尽快扛起半神的职责，以天空的力量庇佑大家。
t_en: Okhema is on the brink, and I must quickly embrace the role of demigod to protect everyone with the power of the Sky.

t_ch: 两位阁下，请告诉我…前方还有什么试炼等待我去完成？
t_en: Honored ones, please tell me... what trials lie ahead for me to complete?

t_ch: 我想，你已经完成了自己应尽的一切…风堇姑娘。
t_en: I think you've already done everything you were meant to, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 你认为呢…塞涅俄丝？
t_en: What do you think... Seliose?

t_ch: 天空之子……
t_en: The Skyfolk...

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝大人？
t_en: Lady Seliose?

t_ch: 原来如此…经历了漫长的岁月，你的意志与泰坦的神性已经融合，难分彼此了呀。
t_en: I see... after all these long years, your will has merged with the Titan's divinity.

t_ch: 我…十分…悔恨……
t_en: I... deeply regret...

t_ch: 我…恳求…原谅……
t_en: I... beg for forgiveness...

t_ch: 人心中的黑暗…遮蔽了我的耳目……
t_en: The darkness in the human heart... clouded my judgment...

t_ch: 集体深处的坚韧…我没能发觉……
t_en: I failed to recognize... the resilience buried deep within...

t_ch: …那天在场的人里，我不知道他们当中有多少是无辜的，又有多少人罪有应得。
t_en: ...Of those present that day, I don't know how many were innocent, how many truly deserved their fate.

t_ch: 所以，我无法替他们原谅你，塞涅俄丝大人……
t_en: That's why I cannot forgive you on their behalf, Lady Seliose...

t_ch: 先祖们的精神同我产生了共鸣。你将我们一族的流放，或许他们也无法轻易原谅。但……
t_en: The spirits of my ancestors resonated with me. You exiled our people, and they may never forgive you for that, but...

t_ch: …但至少有一件事，我们可以达成共识。那是任谁也不能曲解的，关于你的真相——
t_en: ...At least there is one thing we can agree on. The truth that no one can distort —

t_ch: 你敢于举枪反抗神明的胆气是真实的，纯粹的。那份勇气也被后继踏上逐火之路的人们继承了下来，扬厉、壮大。
t_en: The courage it took to defy the gods was undeniable, unwavering. That same spirit now lives on in those who walk the Flame-Chase Journey, growing stronger with every step.

t_ch: 你亲手开启了这个时代，塞涅俄丝……
t_en: You were the spark that set this era in motion, Seliose...

t_ch: 一个英雄辈出，史诗充栋的时代……
t_en: An age where heroes rise and epic stories are told far and wide...

t_ch: 一个为世人保留了希望火种的时代。
t_en: An age where a flame of hope was preserved for the world.
Hehe...

t_ch: 或许…这就是我企盼的……
t_en: Perhaps... this is what I longed for...

t_ch: 如此…我终于能安心合目了……
t_en: Now, I can finally rest in peace...

t_ch: 即便在那至暗的时刻，塞涅俄丝大人，你的心底也还保留着对凡人的怜悯吧？
t_en: Even in that darkest moment, Lady Seliose, you still held compassion for mortals, didn't you?

t_ch: 因为，哪怕拥有泰坦的神力…你还是没有用天空的殒坠惩罚世人。我想，你或许也在等待救赎之人的出现。
t_en: Even with the Titan's power... you didn't punish the world by letting the Sky fall. I imagine you were waiting for someone to bring redemption.

t_ch: 请放心将天空的权柄交给我吧。我只是一名医师，即便拥有了力量，也无法变得和你一样强大……
t_en: Trust me with the power of the Sky. I am merely a healer. I could never match your strength even with that power...

t_ch: 但所幸…如今的世界也不再需要一位能够呼雷唤雨的半神。我需要做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
t_en: Thankfully... the world no longer needs a demigod who can summon thunder and storms. What I must do is merge with the Sky, and...

t_ch: …降下温柔的虹光，守护尽可能多的生灵。
t_en: ...Cast down a gentle rainbow, protecting as many lives as I can.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师…你还记得那一课吗？
t_en: Professor Anaxa... do you remember that lesson?

t_ch: 最后，我还是走上了先祖们的道路，回归了天空…我没能回到地上，和人们一同行走。
t_en: In the end, I followed the path of my ancestors, returning to the Sky... I didn't return to the earth, to walk with the people.

t_ch: 但即便如此……
t_en: But even so...

t_ch: 我还是实现了自己的理想呀。
t_en: I still achieved my dream.

t_ch: 燃烧的天空、破碎的巨像，还有尸横遍野…糟透了。如果这就是「翁法罗斯」内部的样貌，那确实叫人意外。
t_en: Burning skies, shattered statues, corpses strewn everywhere... What a mess. If this is what the inside of "Amphoreus" looks like, it's truly shocking.

t_ch: 老实说，先前我还半信半疑。但这会儿，我开始认同你的观点了……
t_en: To be honest, I was initially skeptical. But right now, I'm starting to see your point...

t_ch: 螺丝。
t_en: Screwy.

t_ch: 既然如此，黑塔。我对「翁法罗斯」世界本质的猜想，你是否也有足够的理由相信了？
t_en: If that's the case, Herta, do you now have enough reason to believe my conjecture about the true nature of "Amphoreus"?

t_ch: 先不展开这个话题。那智械哥——叫「来古士」是吧——还没死透呢。那大概率只是一具假身，藏在它背后的东西…还在违抗我们。
t_en: Let's not expand on that topic just yet. That Intellitron — Lygus, was it? He's not completely dead. That was probably a fake body. Something behind it... is still defying us.

t_ch: 必须承认：即便你我二人联手，穿透它的防护仍不是一件简单的事。
t_en: I must admit, even if both of us worked together, it wouldn't be a simple task piercing through its defenses.

t_ch: 眼下，我们也只能以「旁观者」的视角，窥探这个世界。
t_en: For now, we can only observe this world as bystanders.

t_ch: 早知道就捎上斯蒂芬了。
t_en: I knew we should've brought Stephen along.

t_ch: 难怪流光忆庭要找星穹列车合作，不借助「开拓」的力量，还真没法挖出这地方的秘密。可到头来忆庭平安无事，遭殃的却是无名客，真是好奇心害死阿维啊。
t_en: No wonder the Garden of Recollection wants to work with the Astral Express — without the power of the Trailblaze, it'd be impossible to unearth this place's secrets. But in the end, the Garden emerged unscathed, and it was the Nameless who got burnt. Curiosity definitely killed Aki.

t_ch: 那边的大家伙——就是那个正在往外喷陨石的黑球——你觉得它和那「绝灭大君」有关吗？
t_en: That big guy over there — the black ball spewing meteors — you think it's got anything to do with the Lord Ravager?

t_ch: 很遗憾，串流投影算力不足，我无法对命途能量展开分析。
t_en: Alas, without sufficient computational power in the stream projection, I am unable to analyze the Path Energy.

t_ch: 提议：当务之急是找到两位无名客的下落。对「毁灭」的研究，优先级顺延。我们需要争分夺秒，在那位智械启动反制手段前有所收获。
t_en: Suggestion: The immediate priority now is to find the whereabouts of the two Nameless. Research priority on the Destruction can be lowered. Every second counts, before that Intellitron's preventative measures kick in.

t_ch: 行啦，弄得紧张兮兮的。你我都合作过多少回了，哪次不是完美收官？
t_en: All right, all right, stop making a fuss. How many times have we collaborated, and when did it ever not end in a perfect outcome?

t_ch: 不如再附加一个任务目标：<color=#dbc291ff>玩牌的忆者告诉我，那结了冰的开拓小姑娘，很可能也被困在了翁法罗斯内部。</color>
t_en: Why not add another mission objective while we're at it: <color=#dbc291ff>The card-playing Memokeeper told me that the frozen Trailblazer girl might just also be trapped inside Amphoreus.</color>

t_ch: 若时间允许，我也会一同追查三月七小姐的下落。
t_en: If time allows, I will also investigate March 7th's whereabouts.

t_ch: 黑塔，你听到了么？从山城中心传来了迭迭哭喊，此地的生命正在经受激烈的创伤。
t_en: Herta, do you hear that? A wave of desperate cries from the heart of the mountain city. The lives there are undergoing intense suffering.

t_ch: 结论：蝴蝶已经扇动翅膀，一场风暴正在逼近。无名客是重要的盟友，你我有要事在身，黑塔。我恳请你……
t_en: Conclusion: The butterfly has already flapped its wings, and an impending storm closes in. The Nameless are important allies, and you and I have matters to attend to, Herta. I beseech you...

t_ch: 在需要作出抉择的时候，切不可因为个人兴趣，分散了心神。
t_en: In moments when a choice needs to be made, one must not be distracted due to personal interests.

t_ch: 我当然知道。
t_en: Of course I know that.

t_ch: 啧，命运真是一场骰子游戏啊，螺丝。谁能想到呢？那玩意儿曾让寰宇生灵涂炭，令博识学会分崩离析，直到我破解了孤波算法，才为它残留的余波划上了休止符。
t_en: Tsk, fate really is a game of dice, Screwy. Who'd have thought? That thing once sowed chaos across the cosmos, causing the Intelligentsia Guild to splinter and disintegrate. It wasn't until I cracked the solitary waves theory that its lingering effects were put to an end.

t_ch: 可偏偏在一个无人在意的银河角落，竟然还有一台漏网之鱼仍在运转；又偏偏是它，最后成了孕育一名「绝灭大君」的摇篮……
t_en: Yet, in a forgotten corner of the cosmos, one slipped through the net and remained operational. And it was this machine that eventually became the cradle for the birth of a certain Lord Ravager...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯悲剧的源头……
t_en: The source of Amphoreus' tragedy...

t_ch: 是一台残存至今的「帝皇权杖」啊。
t_en: ...is an Emperor's Scepter that survived to this day.

t_ch: 这就是，世界原本的样子？
t_en: This is... what the world looked like originally?

t_ch: 那你又为何会出现在这里？
t_en: And what are you doing here?

t_ch: …回答我的问题，来古士。
t_en: ...Answer my question, Lygus.

t_ch: 啊…涡心再次迎来了一位英雄。我已记不清这是第几次了。
t_en: Ah... Another hero has arrived at the Vortex. I can no longer remember how many times this has happened.

t_ch: 每一篇史诗的作者，均如那既定的预言所书，在此处封笔。
t_en: The author of each epic, as the prophecy has foretold, stays their pen at this point.

t_ch: 正如每一世演算，均如<color=#dbc291ff>祂</color>原初的设计那般，在此处终结。
t_en: Just like each cycle of the extrapolation, in accordance to <color=#dbc291ff>THEIR</color> primordial design, ends here.

t_ch: 不必紧张，白厄阁下。我踏入此间，只是为了一个纯粹的目的：亲眼见证神谕中「创世的奇迹」。
t_en: No need to panic, Lord Phainon. I stepped into this space purely for one purpose: To witness the prophecy's Miracle of Genesis.

t_ch: …你从未展现过对逐火之旅的兴趣。在我和同伴们为火种奔走、流血、牺牲之时，你也从未伸出过援手。
t_en: ...You've never expressed interest in the Flame-Chase Journey. When my companions and I ran, bled, and sacrificed for the Coreflames, you never so much as lifted a finger.

t_ch: 一介冰冷的旁观者，将「中立」贯彻到底的安提基色拉人…怎就突然关心起了黄金裔的使命？
t_en: An indifferent observer, an Antikytheran who is neutral till the end... Why would you suddenly express concern for the Chrysos Heirs' mission?

t_ch: 那孤独的剑士告别一切，只身浸入疯狂之海时，我就在岸边聆听；那伟岸的霸主卸下战甲，以铁骨填平大地的裂隙时，我就在山巅俯瞰。
t_en: When that lone swordmaster left everything behind, plunging into a sea of madness, I was on the shore, listening. When that mighty lord shed his armor, filling the crevices of the earth with his iron bones, I was on the mountain top, gazing down.

t_ch: 跨越千年的逐火征程，我将汝等黄金裔的苦难、决意、分裂、团结尽收眼中……
t_en: Across a thousand years of the Flame-Chase Journey, I have witnessed the ardor, resolve, division, and unity of the Chrysos Heirs with mine own eyes...

t_ch: 正如你们生来背负神谕的指引，在沐浴来自遥远星辰的视线之后，我同样看见了至深至暗的命运……
t_en: Just as you were all born to shoulder the guidance of the prophecy, I too, having bathed in the gaze of distant stars, have seen the deepest, darkest of destinies...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我将成为史诗最忠诚的读者，将汝等英雄伟业尽收眼底的观众。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I will become the most loyal reader of the epics, a spectator voraciously consuming the valorous deeds of you heroes.</color>

t_ch: 「遥远星辰的视线」…？
t_en: "The gaze of distant stars"...?

t_ch: 终有一日，你会理解的。但不是现在。
t_en: One day, you will understand. But not now.

t_ch: 此刻，请忽略我这位旁观者，去完成你必须完成的事业吧，白厄阁下。
t_en: At this moment, please disregard this observer, and finish what you must, Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 我曾坚信，只要不断追逐火光，前路的迷雾就会散去，命运会展现它最真诚的样子。
t_en: I once believed that as long as I chased the flames relentlessly, the fog before me would clear, and fate would reveal its truest form.

t_ch: 但这一路走来，我们…他们，所有逝去的人，从未获得神谕应允的公正。
t_en: But along the way, we... they, all who passed, never once received the justice promised by the prophecy.

t_ch: 我听到了：涡心之外，世界在崩塌，人子在哭嚎。
t_en: I have perceived: Outside the Vortex, the world is collapsing, and the children of humanity are crying.

t_ch: 而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
t_en: But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...

t_ch: ——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
t_en: It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...

t_ch: 如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
t_en: If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...

t_ch: …再引入第一缕烈阳的光芒。
t_en: ...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.

t_ch: …是你吗？
t_en: ...Is it you?

t_ch: 众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。
t_en: All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate.

t_ch: 然而这一次，无限轮回的史诗……
t_en: Yet this time, will an epic with endless cycles...

t_ch: 要翻开新的一页了么？
t_en: ...turn a new page?

t_ch: …当然。
t_en: ...Of course.

t_ch: 这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事……
t_en: This will be a romantic story like none that has come before...

t_ch: 你也是这么想的，对吧？
t_en: You think so too, right?

t_ch: 塞纳托斯与瑟希斯的火种已经归位。
t_en: Thanatos's and Cerces's Coreflames have been returned.

t_ch: 那之后，又过了一段时间……
t_en: Some time after that...

t_ch: 十二座星辰悬浮在虚空中，俯瞰着创世涡心。
t_en: The twelve constellations hover above, overlooking the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 它们象征着翁法罗斯的十二位神灵：这个世界的命运、支柱、生灵和灾祸。
t_en: They embody the twelve Amphorean deities: Fate, Foundation, Creations, and Calamity of this world.

t_ch: 如今，其中十尊已然殒落，火种被还归于创世的起点。星座在你头顶闪烁，璀璨的光芒对应着泰坦长眠的息声。
t_en: Now, ten among them have fallen, their Coreflames returned to the origin of genesis. Above you, constellations shimmer, their brilliance echoing the faint slumber of each Titan.

t_ch: 而你…亲身经历了四次擢升，四场离别。
t_en: And you... have experienced four ascensions and four partings.

t_ch: 「纷争」…
t_en: "Strife"...

t_ch: 「岁月」…
t_en: "Time"...

t_ch: 「理性」…
t_en: "Reason"...

t_ch: 「死亡」…
t_en: "Death"...

t_ch: 真是一段好长的路啊…
t_en: What a long journey it's been...

t_ch: 一次次分别并未令你麻木，你忍不住思考，「开拓」的旅程还会经历多少告别？你好奇，自己能否以饱满的情绪道出每一句「再见」？
t_en: Time and again, farewells haven't numbed you. You can't help but wonder — how many more goodbyes will the journey of "Trailblazing" entail? You question whether you'll be able to express each "goodbye" with heartfelt emotion.

t_ch: 思绪沉入海洋…你想起翁法罗斯人热衷史诗，通过故事缓和内心的哀愁。或许你也该以这种方式消解低落，重新振作起来——
t_en: Your thoughts sink into the ocean... You recall how the Amphoreans cherish epics, using stories to soothe their sorrows. Perhaps you should embrace this way to dispel your melancholy and regain your strength...

t_ch: ——那就开始吧。无数与冒险有关的词汇涌入你的心窍，你只需抓住其中一个作为创作的锚点……
t_en: Then let it begin. Countless words of adventure surge through your mind — you need only to grasp just one to anchor your creation...

t_ch: 不要被外界的喧杂影响，集中于你脑海中的关键词……
t_en: Don't be influenced by the noise outside, just focus on the keyword in your mind...

t_ch: 嗯，这的确很难。但你还是应该牢牢抓住灵感，编织发自肺腑的清词丽句……
t_en: Mm-hmm, it is indeed difficult. But you should still cling tightly to your inspiration, weaving heartfelt and elegant verses...

t_ch: …好吧，这根本就是个不可能的任务。只看一眼手机，这绝对不会影响你的思考——你如此告诉自己。
t_en: ...Alright, this is an impossible task. Just one glance at your phone. It won't disrupt your thoughts, or so you tell yourself.

t_ch: 天谴之矛曾一度化作狂王，为全世带去无尽的纷争，而后，于你们的奋勇下终结。
t_en: The Lance of Fury once became the Mad King, plunging the world into ceaseless strife, until your valor brought it to an end.

t_ch: 而继承其位的半神——不死的迈德漠斯，选择独自背负悬锋之名，还乡代冠，将其身化作圣城的最后一道防线。
t_en: And its demigod successor, the undying Mydeimos, chose to bear the title of Kremnos alone, returning home to be crowned as the last line of defense for the holy city.

t_ch: 万敌，愿你战无不胜。
t_en: Mydei, may your battles know no defeat.

t_ch: 其时，命运三相殿中，岁月的化身将迷迷托付于你；其时，活泼的红发少女完成了使命，与众人先一步道别。
t_en: Back then, the Incarnation of Time entrusted Mem to you at the Temple of the Three Fates. Back then, the lively girl with red hair fulfilled her mission, and bid the first farewell.

t_ch: 岁月不语公平，但岁月从未停驻，而如今，这份权能已然交付于你。
t_en: Time speaks not of fairness, yet it never stops. And now this power resides in your hands.

t_ch: 明天见，缇安。
t_en: See you tomorrow, Trianne.

t_ch: 不久前，树庭贤人之首与你们相伴，将黑潮中步出的残虐威胁斥回。
t_en: Not long ago, the head of the Grove Sages helped you repel the menace that is the black tide.

t_ch: 仍是不久前，那位不羁的学者献上了一幕盛大演出，以生命为代价，令你们窥见了这世界真相的一隅。
t_en: And still not long past, that unruly scholar staged one grand performance, granting you a glimpse of this world's truth at the cost of his life.

t_ch: 理性的化身啊，在存在的尽头，你是否寻见了答案？
t_en: Oh, the Incarnation of Reason, have you found your answer at the end of existence?

t_ch: 神谕曾令灰黯之手选择二人，赐予其一死之命运，但她们对彼此的心意，却为各自续下了漫长的凄美诗篇。
t_en: The prophecy once made the Hand of Shadow choose two people, granting one the fate of death. Yet their bond wove a hauntingly beautiful tale that stretched across time.

t_ch: 最终，从冥界旅至现世的死亡半身，决意驻身那片花海，为你寻回「未来」。
t_en: At the end, the Incarnation of Death who journeyed from the nether realm to the living world chose to remain in that sea of flowers, retrieving your future.

t_ch: 在西风尽头再会吧，遐蝶。
t_en: At the end of the west wind, we shall meet again, Castorice.

t_ch: 你必须承认，在这难熬且挣扎的低谷期，依然有人过得快活。赛飞儿，她对财富的渴望滔滔不绝、倒海翻江，仿佛比鳞渊境的海水更加澎湃。
t_en: You must admit that some people still manage to live joyfully at this arduous low point in life. Cipher's endless desires for wealth seem more turbulent than the waters of Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 暂且忘记过去吧，它让人感到悲伤——但现在不应该哀伤，你需要前进的动力。
t_en: Forget the past for now — it only brings sorrow. But sadness has no place in this moment. What you need is the drive to move forward.

t_ch: 你决定前往冥河不再被阻断的斯缇科西亚，去和那位猫女汇合。希望那些闪闪发光且当啷作响的玩意，能一如既往…令人振奋起来。
t_en: You decide to head to Styxia, where the River of Souls is no longer blocked, to meet up with that catgirl. Hopefully, those glittering, clinking trinkets will, as always... lift your spirits.

t_ch: …斯缇科西亚的月光，真美呀。
t_en: ...Styxia's moonlight is so beautiful.

t_ch: 冥河静悄悄的，好像发生的一切只是场梦。小蝶…她在那边还好吗？如果人家写一封信，用漂流瓶送去，她会收到吗？
t_en: And the River of Souls is so quiet... It's like everything that happened was just a dream. I wonder if Cas is doing okay on the other side? If I write a letter and put it in a drift bottle, will she be able to read it?

t_ch: 我也想遐蝶了…
t_en: I miss Castorice too...

t_ch: …不行不行，不能把气氛弄得这么沉重！
t_en: No. No! This shouldn't be so depressing!

t_ch: 现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
t_en: Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!

t_ch: 现在不是感伤的时候。
t_en: Now's not the time to feel down.

t_ch: …说得对，约好了要继续逐火之旅，可不能让小蝶担心呀。
t_en: ... You're right. We promised Cas that we'd continue the Flame-Chase Journey, so we can't let her worry.

t_ch: 现在不是感伤的时候，来，和人家一起——睁大眼睛，打起精神！
t_en: Now's not the time to feel down. We gotta pull ourselves together!

t_ch: 不过话说回来，赛飞儿小姐把我们叫到这儿，她自己怎么不见啦……
t_en: By the way, it was Miss Cipher who asked us to come here, but where has she gone...?
...Huh?

t_ch: 什么动静？
t_en: What's that sound?

t_ch: 不知道，可是这气息…有点熟悉……
t_en: I don't know, but this aura... feels so familiar.

t_ch: 有人在这里？
t_en: Is there someone else here?

t_ch: 对，而且这气息…有点熟悉……
t_en: Yes, and this aura... feels so familiar.

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，我们一起过去看看吧。但千万要小心……
t_en: ... {NICKNAME}, let's go check it out together. Be very careful...

t_ch: 人家…有种不妙的预感。
t_en: I... I have a bad feeling about this.

t_ch: 看，地上那块东西是什么？…要把它捡起来看看吗？
t_en: Hey, what's that on the ground? Should we pick it up...?

t_ch: 小心翼翼地……
t_en: Careful... Careful...

t_ch: …一块黑色的布？
t_en: It's... a piece of black cloth?

t_ch: 好眼熟呀，是不是在哪儿见过……
t_en: Now, where have I seen this before...

t_ch: 「盗火行者」…
t_en: It's the Flame Reaver...

t_ch: 这…怎么会？它怎么会在这里……
t_en: Wh—What? How could they be here?

t_ch: 谁扯我衣服？
t_en: Did someone rip off a piece of my clothes?

t_ch: …不是，你的衣服没破洞啦！
t_en: Wha— No. Your clothes are perfectly fine!

t_ch: 这是…是那「盗火行者」的斗篷？！它怎么会在这里……
t_en: Could this be from... the Flame Reaver's cloak!? Why is it here?

t_ch: …迷、迷迷！！
t_en: Mem! Memi!!!

t_ch: ——{NICKNAME}，小心！
t_en: — {NICKNAME}, look out!

t_ch: 迷迷，准备应战——
t_en: Mem, get ready —

t_ch: 冷静！它的力量，咱们都见识过……
t_en: Wait! We both know what this thing can do...

t_ch: 粉色小狗才是你的目标！
t_en: You want the pink puppy, don't you?

t_ch: 好伤心！这会儿就别开玩笑了——
t_en: I — What? Now I'm sad! This isn't the time for jokes —

t_ch: 终于，该我退场了吗…
t_en: Is it finally time... for me to bow out?

t_ch: 别、别这么轻易放弃呀！
t_en: D—Don't give up just like that!

t_ch: 总之，我们先尽力和它周旋吧！一旦抓住破绽，就发动「岁月」的权柄，躲到往世中去！
t_en: Let's try our best to deal with them for now, and we'll slip into the past with Time's power as soon as we can!

t_ch: 冥河……
t_en: The River of Souls...

t_ch: 藏有大鱼…少刺多汁。
t_en: Is full of fish... Big and delicious.
What.

t_ch: 逐火之旅…阻止……
t_en: The Flame-Chase Journey... stops...

t_ch: 喵呜…喵呜。
t_en: Meow... meow...

t_ch: …喵、喵呜？
t_en: M—Meow?

t_ch: …它在说什么？
t_en: ...What's happening?

t_ch: 这是什么谜语？
t_en: Is this meant to be a riddle?

t_ch: 好、好陌生的语言，人家是不是出现幻听了……
t_en: I—I don't understand this language at all. Am I hallucinating...?

t_ch: 这家伙，精神错乱了。
t_en: The Flame Reaver's gone mad. The end.

t_ch: 这、这早就是共识了吧？可现在是性命攸关的紧急情况——
t_en: W—We already knew about the mad part! But are we still in danger...?

t_ch: 嘿…嘿嘿……
t_en: Hehehe... hehehehehe...

t_ch: …哈哈哈哈！
t_en: ...Hehehahahahahahha!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈…对不住了，看见你俩毫无防备地站在那儿，我就忍不住想吓唬吓唬哪！
t_en: Ahahahahaha... Sorry. I couldn't pass on the chance to give you two a good scare!

t_ch: 赛飞儿，原来是你——
t_en: So it's you! Cipher!

t_ch: 这人素质太差，走了——
t_en: What a terrible person. Let's leave.

t_ch: 这也是假的，快跑——
t_en: This Cipher must be fake too. Run!

t_ch: 哎唷，别跑别跑——我是真的赛飞儿，如假包换！
t_en: Ah! Don't run! I'm the real Cipher! The real one!

t_ch: 别生气呀，整这一出只是为了给你们提个醒，翁法罗斯可一点都不安全，全是流窜的威胁，包括那个黑衣剑客…不管在哪里都要提高警惕！
t_en: C'mon, don't be upset. I'm just giving you a kind reminder that Amphoreus isn't safe at all. The whole place is full of dangers, including that swordmaster... Make sure you stay on your toes, no matter where you are!

t_ch: 好赖话都让你说了。
t_en: So you're playing both good cop and bad cop.

t_ch: 就是找补一下，人之常情嘛~
t_en: Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You'd do the same in my shoes.

t_ch: 那还真是谢谢你啊。
t_en: Well, ain't I grateful for the reminder.

t_ch: 哎，我就是给自己找补一下，你可别记仇啊！
t_en: Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You're not gonna hold that over me, are you?

t_ch: 我强得可怕，根本用不着。
t_en: I'm so strong that I don't need your reminder.

t_ch: 嗯？可我看你刚才，明明吓得灰毛都竖起来了哪？
t_en: Really? But just a minute ago that gray hair of yours was all standing up, you were so scared.

t_ch: 所以，那「盗火行者」是赛飞儿小姐的伪装？骗术？像真的一样…这就是「诡计」半神的力量？
t_en: So... was that a Flame Reaver disguise? Or a magic trick? It looked so real... Is that the power of the Trickery demigod?

t_ch: 伪装？不不不，可不是这种骗小孩子的把戏，让我想想该怎么解释……
t_en: Disguise? No no no, it's not as simple as that. Lemme think about how to explain this...

t_ch: 打个比方，刚才，你们认出那块碎布是盗火行者的东西以后，心里想的是什么?
t_en: For example, what did you think when you realized that piece of cloth came from the Flame Reaver's cloak?

t_ch: 嗯…「难道盗火行者在这附近」？
t_en: Hmm... We thought that maybe the Flame Reaver was around here somewhere?

t_ch: 没错。然后，你们听到了脚步声——是我故意发出来的——那时，你们心里又在想什么？
t_en: That's right. And then you heard some footsteps. What did you think when that happened?

t_ch: 「糟了…一定是盗火行者来了」？
t_en: Well, we thought it must be the Flame Reaver coming this way...?

t_ch: 对咯，就是这样——我所做的，只是通过各种诱导和暗示，让你们对一件并不存在的事信以为真……
t_en: Yep, exactly. I just used some hints and mental suggestions to help you believe in a lie...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「谎言」——这才是扎格列斯的招牌，只要人人信以为真，假象也能化作现实！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Lies" are what Zagreus is best at. If everyone believes in a lie, then it becomes reality!</color>

t_ch: 化谎言为真实的力量…真叫人家粉毛倒竖呀！
t_en: A power to make lies into reality... That's got all my hairs standing up!

t_ch: 哈哈，这下套出你的秘密了！
t_en: Nice! Now I know your secret!

t_ch: 你桀骜不驯的样子真可爱哪，小灰子~
t_en: I sure love your arrogance, Gray Mystery~

t_ch: 你就这么全部抖出来了？
t_en: And... you're just telling us everything like that?

t_ch: 怕我话里有诈？哈，大可不必！
t_en: You think I might be lying? Pfft. No need.

t_ch: 裁缝女那么信任你，自有她的道理。像你这样的老实人，想坑也坑不到本姑娘，所以——告诉你也无妨。
t_en: The seamstress trusts you for a reason. Someone as honest as you couldn't trick me even if you wanted to, so there's no harm in telling you.

t_ch: 况且咱们还得搭伙寻宝呢，对吧？闲话就说到这儿，该出发咯……
t_en: Besides, we still need to team up to go treasure hunting, right? Let's wrap up here. It's time to get going~

t_ch: …嗯？你的传信石版响了？
t_en: ...Oh? Was that your teleslate?

t_ch: 嚯…你可真受欢迎啊。但凡事讲究先来后到，先陪我搞定宝贝的事，我再送你俩去树庭呗？
t_en: Heh, aren't you a popular one? But I got to you first, so help me with the treasures, and then I'll send you two to the Grove.

t_ch: 话说回来，你要那么多钱干嘛？
t_en: Why do you need so much money anyway?

t_ch: 好奇心还真重哪…你以为我会到处挥霍？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
t_en: Curiosity killed the cat, you know? Do you think I'll spend it all? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.

t_ch: 捞完这笔，打算去哪潇洒？
t_en: Gonna go live handsomely somewhere after this?

t_ch: 潇洒？你是指，消费？哈，我打捞宝藏可不是为了这个。
t_en: Live handsomely? You mean, spend all this money? Pfft. That's so not why I hunt for treasures.

t_ch: 别忘了，我也是半神，那愚蠢的预言也有我一份：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文」……</color>
t_en: Don't forget. I'm a demigod too, and there's a line reserved for me in that stupid prophecy as well... <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>

t_ch: 但本姑娘不信这个，只要不断敛取宝藏，就不至于落得身无分文的下场；只要不因为自己的欲望害得其他人遭殃，就算不上「贪婪」——对吧？简简单单。
t_en: But I don't believe in that. As long as I keep collecting treasures, then I won't need to care about petty change. And as long as I don't hurt other people when I get what I want, I won't be "walking with greed" — right? Isn't that simple?

t_ch: 只要我顺着这条路奔跑下去，什么注定实现的预言、宿命…都追不上我。
t_en: So, as long as I keep going down this path... all those predestined prophecies and fates will never catch up to me!

t_ch: 哎，这一连串话说得，我嘴皮子都快磨破了！斯缇科西亚的财宝还在水底下等着咱们哪，赶紧让我见识见识「岁月」的神力吧，灰子？
t_en: Phew. That was a long speech. I'm getting thirsty at this rate! The treasures of Styxia aren't gonna float up on their own. Come on, Gray Mystery, show me what the authority of "Time" can do!

t_ch: 多亏了灰子和粉松鼠，这古城的宝贝全都浮出水面咯！
t_en: The treasures in this ancient city are all floating back up thanks to Gray Mystery and that pink squirrel!

t_ch: 我在黄金裔建议下接受了「岁月」的试炼，却发现自己早在进入翁法罗斯时就已经「死去」。为了寻回我被夺走的未来，众人加快步伐寻找「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯的踪迹。
t_en: Following the advice of the Chrysos Heirs, I embarked on the trial of Time, only to learn that I had been "dead" since the moment I stepped onto Amphoreus. To reclaim the future that had been stolen from me, we pushed onward in pursuit of the Death Titan, Thanatos.

t_ch: 另一边，神悟树庭七贤人那刻夏脱离金线监视，主动寻求元老院的庇护。在获得元老院信任之后，他与寄宿体内的「理性」泰坦瑟希斯一同登上云崖，觐见「负世」泰坦刻法勒。
t_en: Meanwhile, Anaxa, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, broke free from the surveillance of the golden threads and actively sought refuge from the Council of Elders. After winning the Council's trust, he ascended Dawncloud with Cerces the Reason Titan who resided within him, and sought an audience with Kephale the Worldbearing Titan.

t_ch: 为了换取冥界入口的信息，遐蝶只好促成元老院提出「暂停逐火之旅」的议题，并在半神赛飞儿的帮助下，赶往龙骸古城•斯缇科西亚。
t_en: To obtain information about the entrance to the nether realm, Castorice had no choice but to support the Council of Elders in proposing a pause in the Flame-Chase Journey. With the aid of the demigod Cipher, she set out for the Dragonbone City — Styxia.

t_ch: 遐蝶成功炼成死龙•玻吕刻斯，并利用它回到冥界见到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯，并将泰坦火种与夺走的未来悉数归还，翁法罗斯的生死流转重归有序。
t_en: Castorice successfully recreated the Netherwing, Pollux, via alchemy and used its power to return to the nether realm, where she faced Thanatos the Death Titan. She returned both the Titan's Coreflame and the stolen future, restoring the cycle of life and death in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 那刻夏的灵魂在冥界见到遐蝶，完成了创世猜想的证明。他在公民大会上投出关键一票，并利用渎神罪行重挫元老院夺权野心，使「逐火之旅」得以继续。
t_en: Anaxa's soul met Castorice in the nether realm, where he proved his hypothesis regarding creation. At the citizens' assembly, he cast a pivotal vote and used the charge of blasphemy to thwart the Council of Elders's schemes for power, allowing the Flame-Chase Journey to continue.

t_ch: 那刻夏归还{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种后，肉身彻底归殁。至此，「逐火之旅」即将到达尾声，众人将目光移向天空……
t_en: After returning {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame, Anaxa's physical body completely disappeared. With this, the Flame-Chase Journey neared its conclusion, and all eyes turned skyward...

t_ch: 数日后，在命运重渊的车厢坠毁点……
t_en: A few days later, at the crash site in the Abyss of Fate...

t_ch: …原来这便是您口中「星穹列车」的一节。我的忆库又增添了一则有趣的见闻。感谢您的引领，丹恒阁下。
t_en: ...So, this is the car of the Astral Express you've spoken of. My repository of memories has been enriched with another fascinating piece of information. Thank you for leading me here, Lord Dan Heng.

t_ch: 没想到您贵为元老会的议员，竟愿意远道来此查勘列车。
t_en: I'm surprised a Council Elder like yourself would be willing to journey so far to inspect the Express.

t_ch: 奥赫玛人尊重智慧，渴望知识。若满城公民都知晓了二位的来历，想必会有更多人对「开拓」产生兴致——可惜对「天外之界」的探讨至今仍是禁忌。
t_en: Okhemans hold wisdom and knowledge in high esteem. If the citizens knew of your origins, I'm sure more would be intrigued by "the Trailblaze." Sadly, discussions about the "world beyond the sky" remain taboo.

t_ch: 距两位阁下初临奥赫玛已经过去许久，想必你们一直在寻找离开的方法？
t_en: It's been quite some time since you first arrived in Okhema. Presumably you've been looking for a way to leave ever since?

t_ch: 我确实在持续搜集线索，做各种尝试。可惜了解得越多，无力感也就越强。
t_en: I've been actively gathering clues and testing different things. Sadly, the more I find out, the more powerless I feel.

t_ch: 阁下不必自咎。令翁法罗斯众多学者费神千年的难题，即便您天资过人，也不可能于一朝一夕间得到解答。
t_en: Don't be too hard on yourself, my lord. This puzzle has stumped Amphoreus's scholars for centuries. It isn't something you can solve overnight... even someone as gifted as yourself.

t_ch: 在树庭，我找到许多有关天空泰坦的研究，也了解到翁法罗斯的学者大多把「天外之界」的禁忌归结于艾格勒降下的诅咒。
t_en: In the Grove, I discovered extensive research on the Sky Titan. It appears that many scholars from Amphoreus believe the taboo against the "world beyond the sky" stems from a curse cast by Aquila.

t_ch: 正是。在翁法罗斯的十二位泰坦神明中，艾格勒是最为阴晴不定的一位。
t_en: Exactly. Of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus, Aquila is known for being the most capricious.

t_ch: 它的喜怒会显化为世间的天象：晴时平静，雨时哀愁。它的吐息是料峭的微风，尖啸则是惊鸿的雷电。
t_en: The weather itself reflects their mood: Tranquil sunshine, mournful rain. Aquila's breath is a brisk wind, and their cries resound as thunder in a storm.

t_ch: 它也是火种尚未被归还的两位泰坦之一。
t_en: Additionally, Aquila is one of the two Titans whose Coreflames have yet to be returned.

t_ch: 我们头顶的天空与每一位公民息息相关，将讨伐艾格勒留到逐火之旅的最后，想必是阿格莱雅女士经过深思熟虑制定的战略。
t_en: The sky above affects every citizen. It's clear that Lady Aglaea's decision to confront Aquila at the end of the Flame-Chase Journey was a carefully considered strategy.

t_ch: 如果归还艾格勒的火种能令天空诅咒失效，那我们也不必费尽心思寻找归路了…只要专心帮助黄金裔们便是。
t_en: If returning Aquila's Coreflame can break the sky's curse, we won't have to exhaust ourselves searching for a way back. We can simply focus on aiding the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 安提基色拉人已经没有可以归还的家乡，因而我能体会您对故友与家园的关切。
t_en: Antikytherans have no home to return to, so I understand your concern for your old friends and homeland.

t_ch: 刚刚，我以安提基色拉的技术鉴识——或者，以您更熟悉的词语——「扫描」了这节车厢。假定我的判断无误，或许我能对其「动力设备」进行更彻底的检修。
t_en: I used Antikytheran technology — or "scanning," as you might call it — to assess this car. Assuming my judgment is correct, I might be able to conduct a thorough overhaul of its "power systems."

t_ch: 真的吗？但……
t_en: Really? But...

t_ch: 当然，前提是丹恒阁下允许我同它接触。
t_en: Of course, that's only if you, my lord, permit me to interact with it.

t_ch: …无妨，请您试试吧。还请一定小心，列车的推进器是十分精密的装置。
t_en: ...By all means, please proceed. But be careful, the Express's thrusters are extremely delicate.

t_ch: 承蒙您的信任，我定会谨慎再三。
t_en: You honor me with your trust. I will be very careful.

t_ch: 来古士仔细地扫描了损坏的车厢推进装置，随后开始有条不紊地检查其中的部件……
t_en: Lygus carefully scans the damaged propulsion system, then methodically began inspecting its components...

t_ch: 这…不可思议，您好像对它的结构一清二楚。您修理过类似的东西吗？
t_en: This... is unbelievable. You seem to understand its structure perfectly. Have you repaired something like this before?

t_ch: 并不。但安提基色拉人对于机械一向敏感——刻法勒在捏造我族时赋予了得天独厚的优势，令我们极擅解构和学习。
t_en: Not exactly. But we Antikytherans are inherently sensitive to machinery. Kephale endowed our kind with a unique advantage for analyzing and learning.

t_ch: 若您给我一些时间，或许我能完全修复这节破损的车厢，令其完好如初。如此一来，您与{NICKNAME}阁下便能提早踏上归途了。
t_en: If you give me some time, I might be able to fully restore this damaged car to its former glory. Then you and your esteemed companion could set off on your return journey sooner.

t_ch: 可…问题的关键不是在艾格勒身上吗？
t_en: But... isn't the real issue with Aquila?

t_ch: 假设，丹恒阁下，我能为两位开辟一条脱离翁法罗斯的通路，且能绕过艾格勒的神罚……
t_en: Hypothetically, Lord Dan Heng, if I could open up a path out of Amphoreus that circumvents Aquila's divine punishment...

t_ch: 你们会愿意中止对逐火之旅的助力吗？
t_en: Would you consider ceasing your support for the Flame-Chase Journey?

t_ch: 我不明白…难道元老院握有什么能抵消神罚的秘密手段？
t_en: I don't understand... Does the Council of Elders possess some secret means of counteracting divine punishment?

t_ch: 个中奥秘，还请阁下勿要深究。您只需知晓：我可以办到这件事。
t_en: It's best if you don't delve too deeply into that question, my lord. All you need to know is, I can make it happen.

t_ch: （不是元老院的决意，而是他个人的意愿么……）
t_en: (Maybe this is not a decision by the Council of Elders but rather his personal wish...)

t_ch: 重点在于，若您和同伴不愿就此中止对黄金裔的支持…那或许会触犯到部分人的利益。
t_en: The crucial point is, if you and your companion are unwilling to halt your support for the Chrysos Heirs... it could offend certain interests.
Hmm...

t_ch: 请原谅，来古士阁下，我接下来的话可能会有些冒犯。拜访黎明云崖时，我翻看了许多元老院议员的档案……
t_en: Forgive me, Lord Lygus, but I must be frank. When visiting Dawncloud, I reviewed the records of many Council Elders...

t_ch: 其中，唯有您的背景近乎一片空白。我很想接受您的善意，但面对如此神秘的背景和动因，稍有戒心之人都难免会起疑。
t_en: Among them, only your background was nearly blank. I'd like to accept your goodwill, but given such a mysterious background and motives, anyone cautious would have doubts.

t_ch: 不愧是丹恒阁下。您的谨慎令我钦佩……
t_en: Your prudence impresses me, just as expected...

t_ch: 这些人……
t_en: Are these people—

t_ch: 圈套么…难道这才是你跟随我前来的目的？
t_en: Is this a trap? Is that why you accompanied me here?

t_ch: 请别误会，丹恒阁下。作为「神礼观众」，我没有立场支持他们的计划。相应地，我也没有阻拦他们的义务。我即是中立。
t_en: Please don't misunderstand, Lord Dan Heng. As the Theoros, I have no allegiance to their plans nor am I obliged to obstruct them. I am neutral.

t_ch: 只是出于我个人对阁下的尊敬，我希望能提供一种和平的解决方案，以保障您和同伴的人身安全。
t_en: Out of respect for you, I hope to offer a peaceful solution to ensure the safety of you and your companion.

t_ch: …一对四啊。
t_en: ...One against four, then.

t_ch: 姑且确认一下：假如等会儿的场面变得难看…你会出手相助吗？
t_en: Just to confirm: if things turn ugly later... will you help?

t_ch: 不会。如我所说，我始终保持中立。
t_en: I will not. As I said, I remain neutral.

t_ch: 您会如此发问，是打算拒绝我的提议，继续站在黄金裔一边吗？
t_en: Are you asking this because you plan to refuse my offer and continue supporting the Chrysos Heirs?

t_ch: 有一点你没有说错，来古士阁下。的确，我们必须设法返回列车伙伴身边……
t_en: You weren't wrong about one thing, Lord Lygus. Indeed, we must try to return to our companions...

t_ch: 但「伙伴」这两个字…如今也包含了逐火的黄金裔们。无名客不能，也不会对伙伴的命运不管不顾。
t_en: But our "companions" now also include the Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heirs. The Nameless cannot and will not ignore the fate of our companions.

t_ch: 原来如此。这便是您口中的「开拓」。
t_en: So I see. This is what you call "Trailblazing."

t_ch: 另外，当我询问你是否会出手的时候，我的意思是……
t_en: When I asked if you'd help, I meant...

t_ch: …需要帮助的，是他们。
t_en: ...the ones who need help are them.

t_ch: 与此同时，在神悟树庭……
t_en: Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...
Tsk —

t_ch: 明明拥有如此强大的力量，你究竟为何要……
t_en: You have such overwhelming power, so... why...

t_ch: 回答我！你为何要阻挠我们…为什么要抢夺火种？！
t_en: Answer me! Why do you stand in our way... Why do you want to take the Coreflames!?

t_ch: 呃啊——！
t_en: Uwah —!

t_ch: 糟了，他要撑不住了！
t_en: Oh no! He can't hold on anymore!

t_ch: 把他拉回来吧，伙伴！
t_en: Drag him back here, friend!

t_ch: 呼…呼……
你没事吧？
t_en: Are you okay?

t_ch: 我…没事。那一击…我现在能承受住了。若换作几个月前，恐怕早已不省人事。
t_en: I'm okay. I can handle that kind of hit now. But a few months ago, that would've knocked me out.

t_ch: 每次都这么提心吊胆的…
t_en: Always keeping me on edge...

t_ch: 劳你费心了，伙计……
t_en: Thanks for worrying, buddy.

t_ch: 万一我睡过去了就完了。
t_en: If I had passed out, that would've been it.

t_ch: 哈…所以我才让你在路上吃饱睡足嘛。
t_en: Ha... That's why I made sure you were well-fed and rested on the road.

t_ch: 感谢你们愿意帮忙。为了迎战艾格勒，还有潜在的威胁…我必须磨砺自己，用最激进的手段。
t_en: Thanks for the help. To face Aquila and other potential threats, I must sharpen myself with the most aggressive methods.

t_ch: 话虽如此，真亏你能想到这种训练方式。在岁月的长河中与过去的幻影交战，就像是吟游诗人口中的「时间与精神之圣所」……
t_en: Even so, it's impressive you thought of this training method. Battling the phantoms of the past in the river of time... It's just like the "Hyperbolic Time Sanctum" that the bards describe.

t_ch: 哈哈，该说不说，效果还挺明显的？
t_en: Ha, it's working pretty well, wouldn't you say?

t_ch: 但战斗不只靠力量和技巧，还得有趁手的兵刃才行。和那家伙的武器相比，我手里的…哎，就像在挥舞铁块，自训练开始至今，已不知练废多少柄长剑了。
t_en: But combat isn't just about strength and skill. You also need the right weapon. Compared to that guy's weapon, mine feels like I'm swinging a lump of iron. I can't tell you how many swords I've gone through since the training began.

t_ch: 怎么不让哈托努斯帮忙？
t_en: Why not get Chartonus to help?

t_ch: 当然需要他。放心吧，我早安排上了。
t_en: Don't worry. I've already arranged that. Of course I need him.

t_ch: 负重训练呀，你这是。
t_en: Weight training, huh?

t_ch: 还好有哈托努斯这个翁法罗斯最一流的铁匠。
t_en: It's a good thing Chartonus is the finest blacksmith in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 我委托他为我打造一柄趁手的神兵。说来有些难为情，为了帮我这个忙，他特地推掉了所有生意。
t_en: I asked him to make a suitable divine weapon for me. It's a little embarrassing to say this, but in order to help me, he deliberately turned down all other business.

t_ch: 毕竟哈托努斯也是逐火之旅的一员，干劲满满呢！
t_en: Chartonus is part of this Flame-Chase Journey after all, full of energy!

t_ch: 哈，回想他最近的状态，也许你猜得没错。
t_en: Ha, thinking about how he's been recently... maybe you're right.

t_ch: 不过，白厄，倒是你这边，人家一直有些在意……
t_en: But, Phainon, I've been somewhat concerned about you...

t_ch: 这段时间，你是不是对那黑衣剑士…越来越执着了？
t_en: Lately, you seem more and more fixated on that swordmaster in black.

t_ch: 这话锋转得，还真令人猝不及防。
t_en: That's quite the sudden shift in topic.

t_ch: 这个问题，人家憋在肚子里好久了！你是在变得越来越强，但不安的种子，也在人家的小身体里发芽长大哦！
t_en: I've been holding this question in for a long time! You're getting stronger, but seeds of unrest are also growing in me!

t_ch: 放心吧，我并非为了复仇而挥剑。尼卡多利的试炼，{NICKNAME}也亲历过。{F#她}{M#他}一定能明白，无法走出过去阴影的人，终究是软弱的。
t_en: Don't worry. I'm not wielding my sword for revenge. {NICKNAME}'s been through Nikador's trial and understands. Those who can't walk out of the shadows of their past are ultimately weak.

t_ch: 今时不同往日，我肩负之物…无比珍贵，也无比脆弱。我为翁法罗斯的明日而挥剑，因此决不允许自己再被仇恨蒙蔽，有失职责。
t_en: Times have changed. The responsibility I bear is both precious and fragile. I wield my sword for the future of Amphoreus. I will not let hatred cloud my judgment again and neglect my duties.

t_ch: 你的确成长了。
t_en: You've really grown.

t_ch: 但还差得远。我必须继续磨练…直到自己能和它势均力敌。
t_en: I'm far from finished. I must continue sharpening my skills... until I can match their strength.

t_ch: 但你现在还赢不过它。
t_en: But you can't beat them yet.

t_ch: 对，所以我必须继续磨练自己…我和它迟早要在战场上作出决断。
t_en: Right, I must continue sharpening my skills... Eventually, I'll need to face them on the battlefield.

t_ch: 你还有我们。
t_en: We'll be here by your side.

t_ch: 说得对，伙计。只凭现在的我还应付不了那家伙，我还需要伙伴们的助力。
t_en: You're right, partner. As of now, I'm not able to handle that swordmaster on my own. I still need the help of my friends.

t_ch: 奇怪，我一发言，话题总会变得沉重…我可不想被你们当成阴郁的家伙。
t_en: Huh... Every time I say something, things get so serious... I don't want to be the person who keeps bringing the mood down.

t_ch: 今天也没力气再练了。不如…我们去友爱之馆找点好看的，换换心情？
t_en: I'm out of energy for training today. How about we go to the Library of Philia to lighten the mood?
